### Fix 3
Line: 346
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: TextInputGroupUtilities

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

  347                <TimesIcon aria-hidden />

```

### Fix 4
Line: 311
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>

Incident context:

  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-textinputgroupmain]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <TextInputGroupMain> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <TextInputGroupMain> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <TextInputGroupMain variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></TextInputGroupMain>
  After:  <TextInputGroupMain variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <TextInputGroupMain> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <TextInputGroupMain><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</TextInputGroupMain>
  After:  <TextInputGroupMain icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</TextInputGroupMain>

### Fix 6

Rule [sd-test-select-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Select is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Select renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Select may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Select
  localName: Select
  module: @patternfly/react-core

    6    MenuToggleElement,
    7    Select,
    8    SelectList,

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/logging-view-plugin/source/web/src/components/filters/search-select.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix against the current file:

**Fix 1** (Line 346): `Button variant="plain"` type changed — added `'stateful'` to the union. The current code uses `variant="plain"` which is still valid. No code change needed — `plain` is still in the type.

**Fix 2** (Line 84 & 361): Select family migration with two incidents:
- Line 84: `SelectOption` should be inside `SelectList` — Looking at the code, `SelectOption` components are returned from `getOptionComponents()` and those are already rendered inside `<SelectList>` at line 372-384. So this is already correct.
- Line 361: `onSelect` type changed from `value?: string | number` to `value?: SelectOptionProps['value']`. The `handleSelect` function at line 198-233 has `value: string | number | undefined`. Need to update this type. `SelectOptionProps` is already imported (line 10).

**Fix 3** (Line 346): Icon children to `icon` prop on Button. The Button at line 346 has only `<TimesIcon aria-hidden />` as children — move it to the `icon` prop.

**Fix 4** (Line 311): Icon children to `icon` prop on MenuToggle. Looking at lines 311-352, the `MenuToggle` has `<TextInputGroup>` as children, not an icon. The `MenuToggle` variant is "typeahead" and contains a TextInputGroup. There's no icon from `@patternfly/react-icons` as a direct child. This rule may be about the icon inside the nested components. But the rule says "icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop" — the MenuToggle doesn't directly have icon children, it has TextInputGroup. I don't see an icon that needs moving here. Let me look more carefully...

The MenuToggle children are the `<TextInputGroup>` block. There are no icons directly inside MenuToggle — the icon is inside a Button inside TextInputGroupUtilities inside TextInputGroup. So this fix doesn't apply to the MenuToggle directly. The MenuToggle doesn't have icon children.

**Fix 5** (Line 328): Icon children to `icon` prop on TextInputGroupMain. Looking at lines 328-343, `TextInputGroupMain` has no icon children — it's a self-closing-style component with only props. No icon from `@patternfly/react-icons` is a child of TextInputGroupMain. This doesn't apply.

**Fix 6** (Line 7): Select behavioral changes in sub-components (Popper `appendTo` default changed). This is a test-impact warning. The code already uses `Select` with specific props. No code change needed in the source file — this is about updating tests.

Let me re-examine Fix 2 more carefully - the `handleSelect` signature needs to be updated to match the new type:
Good — `SelectOptionProps` is already imported. Now let me check the `isOption` helper to understand the `handleSelect` value usage:

content.text: Now let me check for companion test files:
/home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/logging-view-plugin/source/web/src/components/filters/search-select.tsx

No companion test files. Now let me reason through each fix carefully:

### Fix 1 (Line 346): Button variant type changed
The type union for `variant` added `'stateful'`. The current code uses `variant="plain"` which is still valid in the new type. **No code change needed.**

### Fix 2 (Line 84 & 361): Select family migration
Two incidents:
- **Line 84**: `SelectOption` should be inside `SelectList`. Looking at the code, `getOptionComponents()` returns `SelectOption` elements, and these are rendered inside `<SelectList>` at lines 372-384. **Already correct, no change needed.**
- **Line 361**: `onSelect` type changed from `value?: string | number` to `value?: SelectOptionProps['value']`. The `handleSelect` function at line 198-200 uses `value: string | number | undefined`. Need to update this parameter type to `SelectOptionProps['value'] | undefined`. 

### Fix 3 (Line 346): Icon children to `icon` prop on Button
The Button at line 346 contains only `<TimesIcon aria-hidden />` as children. Move it to the `icon` prop and make Button self-closing:
```
Before: <Button variant="plain" onClick={handleClear} aria-label="Clear input value">
          <TimesIcon aria-hidden />
        </Button>
After:  <Button variant="plain" onClick={handleClear} aria-label="Clear input value" icon={<TimesIcon aria-hidden />} />
```

### Fix 4 (Line 311): Icon children to `icon` prop on MenuToggle
The `MenuToggle` at lines 311-352 has `<TextInputGroup>` as its children, not an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The rule fires but there is no icon to move. **No code change needed** — the MenuToggle's children are a TextInputGroup, not an icon element.

### Fix 5 (Line 328): Icon children to `icon` prop on TextInputGroupMain
`TextInputGroupMain` at lines 328-343 has no icon children — it's a component with only props and no child elements. **No code change needed.**

### Fix 6 (Line 7): Select behavioral changes (Popper appendTo default)
This is a test-impact advisory about behavioral changes in rendered sub-components. No source code change needed, and no test files exist. **No code change needed.**

content.text:
Good — `TimesIcon` is still referenced. All imports are still in use. The file is correct.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `"plain"` is still valid in the new type union (only `'stateful'` was added). |
| **Fix 2** | Select family migration (`onSelect` type + `SelectOption` in `SelectList`) | **Applied** | Updated `handleSelect` parameter type from `value: string \| number \| undefined` to `value: SelectOptionProps['value'] \| undefined` (line 200). The `SelectOption` inside `SelectList` conformance incident (line 84) was already correct — `getOptionComponents()` returns `SelectOption` elements that are already rendered inside `<SelectList>` at lines 370-382. |
| **Fix 3** | Icon children to `icon` prop on `Button` | **Applied** | Moved `<TimesIcon aria-hidden />` from Button children to the `icon` prop and made Button self-closing (line 346). |
| **Fix 4** | Icon children to `icon` prop on `MenuToggle` | **No change needed** | The `MenuToggle` (line 311) does not have any icon from `@patternfly/react-icons` as a direct child — its children are `<TextInputGroup>`, not an icon element. |
| **Fix 5** | Icon children to `icon` prop on `TextInputGroupMain` | **No change needed** | `TextInputGroupMain` (line 328) has no icon children — it only has props, no child elements. |
| **Fix 6** | Select transitive behavioral changes (Popper `appendTo` default) | **No change needed** | This is a test-impact advisory. No source code change required, and no companion test files exist for this component. |

### Fix 4
Line: 311
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>
